title: OCP Java SE 21 Developer Complete
description: This course prepares you for the Oracle Certified Professional Java SE 21 Developer exam (1Z0-829). Based on the OCP Oracle Certified Professional Java SE 21 Developer Study Guide by Scott Selikoff and Jeanne Boyarsky. Includes a dedicated module covering the differences introduced in Java 25 (1Z0-831).
benefits: Understand Java building blocks: primitives, operators, and program flow
Apply object-oriented principles: classes, interfaces, inheritance, and polymorphism
Work with generics, collections, and functional interfaces
Process data with lambdas, streams, and the Collections framework
Write concurrent code using threads, executors, and virtual threads
Use the Java module system to package and deploy applications
Apply localization using locales and resource bundles
Build secure and well-structured applications following OCP best practices
Understand what changed from Java 21 to Java 25 for the 1Z0-831 exam
